org.bukkit.inventory.meta.components.UseCooldownComponent

Packages that use UseCooldownComponent
Package
Description
org.bukkit.inventory.meta
The interfaces used when manipulating extra data can can be stored inside item stacks.

    Description
    UseCooldownComponent
    ItemMeta.getUseCooldown()
    Gets the use cooldown set on this item, or creates an empty cooldown instance.
